Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor (€18.5K overdue 168 days); tighten terms immediately post-resolution to prevent recurrence.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retail chain (€3.3K due today); enforce net-30 COD or prepayment on future orders.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: EU distributor (€9.6K, 58 days overdue); export DSO applies but payment discipline needed.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Bars).reason: Protect cash conversion cycle; enforce 3-day settlement without exception.

alerts.message: Escalate #4460 (€18,484, 168 days overdue) to legal/collections immediately; block new shipments until payment plan agreed.
Total overdue (€73,005) equals 116% of April budget revenue; combined with €62,781 monthly fixed costs, cash runway is critical—focus collection calls on top 5 invoices (€43.5K, 60% of backlog).
Invoice #14 (€4,540, 579 days overdue since Aug 2024) is uncollectable; write off and investigate prior controls to prevent repeat.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882, 285 days overdue) requires CEO phone call + payment plan or suspension of credit.
Invoice #6030 (€2,322) due today; monitor daily—if unpaid by 2026-04-17, escalate to collections.
44 open POs (€79,996) are material relative to April budget (€201,863); defer non-critical stock purchases until top-10 overdue invoices show payment activity.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €73K overdue AR (43 invoices) plus €62.8K fixed costs due this month exceeds April revenue by 41%; Alko (€18.5K) and Bemböle contract end (Sept) create twin pressure—immediate collection action required or cash crisis likely in May.
insights.top_action: Place same-day collection calls to Alko Oy Keskusvarasto, Kesko, and My Dear Beer B.V. (combined €31.3K); demand payment by 2026-04-18 EOB or notify they are suspended from new orders effective 2026-04-19.
pattern_insights: Mega-distributor payment discipline broken (Alko 168 days, Kesko 12 days overdue despite size); indicates pricing/terms negotiation failure or cash-flow stress on their end—request senior customer meetings.

Export customers (My Dear Beer B.V., Wittich Weine, Gig Linden) cluster in 8–58-day range, confirming 6–8 week DSO reality; build €30–40K monthly cash reserve for this lag or negotiate supply-chain financing.
insights.wc_note: 62% YoY growth with €73K overdue and zero payment history baseline means working capital is severely strained; €129.6K open AR against €45.9K last-30-day sales implies 75-day DSO company-wide—unsustainable without debt facility or aggressive collection.
